title: The Bundle Of Sticks
content:
To his sons, who fell out, father spake:
    "This Bundle of Sticks you can't break;
    Take them singly, with ease,
    You may break as you please,
    So, dissension your strength will unmake."

    Strength Is In Unity
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Bundle Of Sticks", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
